semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, crosswalks, sidewalks, buildings, parked cars, moving vehicles, pedestrians, cyclists, traffic lights, and signage.

logical.object_continuity: Vehicles, pedestrians, and static structures remain consistently present and trackable across frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and infrastructure maintain stable spatial relationships over time.

decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected; pedestrian activity is contained to sidewalks; traffic flow appears orderly.
